title: The Special Criminal Courts (Jurisdiction) Act, 1950
full_text: The Special Criminal Courts (Jurisdiction) Act, 1950 विशेष दण्ड न्यायालय (अधिकारिता) अधिनियम, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1950-18 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 1950-03-10 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Special Criminal Courts (Jurisdiction) Act, 1950 Hindi Title: विशेष दण्ड न्यायालय (अधिकारिता) अधिनियम, 1950 Long Title: An Act to confer upon special criminal Courts, constituted by or under certain State laws, jurisdiction to try offences against laws with respect to any of the matters enumerated in the Union List. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 10-03-1950 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Special Criminal Courts (Jurisdiction) Act, 1950 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Jurisdiction of special Criminal Courts to try offences with respect to matters in the Union List. Section 4. Power to add to Schedule. Section 5. Repeal of Ordinance. Schedule 1.
